title: The Cure for Love
writer: Robert Donat, Albert Fennell, Walter Greenwood
actors: Robert Donat, Renée Asherson, Marjorie Rhodes
plot: Sergeant Jack Hardacre returns from the war to his contemptible fiancée Janey Jenkins intending to reconcile with her against all odds. But he falls in love with a charming new lodger Milly Southern instead.
